mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommend_report ( user_id, report_title, request_note, generated_content, total_monthly_price, max_monthly_budget, mandatory_items_json, optional_items_json, report_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{reportTitle}, #{requestNote}, #{generatedContent}, #{totalMonthlyPrice}, #{maxMonthlyBudget}, #{mandatoryItemsJson}, #{optionalItemsJson}, #{reportStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO recommend_subscription_item ( report_id, service_name, category, monthly_price, description, sort_order, created_at ) VALUES ( #{reportId}, #{serviceName}, #{category}, #{monthlyPrice}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT report_id, user_id, report_title, request_note, generated_content, total_monthly_price, max_monthly_budget, mandatory_items_json, optional_items_json, report_status, created_at, updated_at FROM recommend_report WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT recommend_item_id, report_id, service_name, category, monthly_price, description, sort_order, created_at FROM recommend_subscription_item WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, recommend_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE recommend_report SET report_title = #{reportTitle}, generated_content = #{generatedContent}, total_monthly_price = #{totalMonthlyPrice}, report_status = #{reportStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
UPDATE recommend_report SET report_title = #{reportTitle}, generated_content = #{generatedContent}, report_status = #{reportStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.select: SELECT report_id, user_id, report_title, request_note, generated_content, total_monthly_price, max_monthly_budget, mandatory_items_json, optional_items_json, report_status, created_at, updated_at FROM recommend_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND report_status = 'SAVED' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, report_id DESC
